name: S-Shark
effect_text: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Your opponent cannot activate [Blocker] during this battle.

name: S-Snake
effect_text: [On Play] Up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less other than [Monkey.D.Luffy] cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next turn.

name: S-Hawk
effect_text: [DON!! x1] If you have less Life cards than your opponent, this Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by <Slash> attribute cards and gains +2000 power.

name: The Earth Will Not Lose!
effect_text: [Counter] If your Leader has the {Shandian Warrior} type, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle. Then, play up to 1 [Upper Yard] from your hand.

name: Burn Blade
effect_text: [Main] You may trash 1 card from the top of your Life cards: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 7 or less.

name: Silvers Rayleigh
effect_text: [On Play] Select up to 2 of your opponent's Characters, and give 1 Character −3000 power and the other −2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less.

name: Kaido & Linlin
effect_text: [When Attacking] DON!! −10: K.O. all Characters other than this Character. Then, add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards and trash up to 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards.

name: Shanks
effect_text: [Once Per Turn] This effect can be activated when your opponent attacks. Give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards −1000 power during this turn.

name: Building Snake
effect_text: [Activate: Main] You may place this Character at the bottom of the owner's deck: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn.

name: Benn.Beckman
effect_text: [On Play] Trash up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 6000 power or less.

name: Bonk Punch
effect_text:
[On Play] Play up to 1 [Monster] from your hand.
[DON!! x1] [When Attacking] This Character gains +2000 power during this turn.

name: Monster
effect_text: If your Character [Bonk Punch] would be K.O.'d by an effect, you may trash this Character instead.

name: Limejuice
effect_text: [On Play] Your opponent cannot activate up to 1 [Blocker] Character that has 4000 power or less during this turn.

name: Wire
effect_text: [DON!! x1] If your Leader has 7000 power or more and the {Kid Pirates} type, this Character gains [Rush].

name: Get Out of Here!
effect_text: [Main] K.O. up to 2 of your opponent's Characters with a total power of 4000 or less.

name: Nobody Hurts a Friend of Mine!!!!
effect_text: [Main] If your Leader has the {Red-Haired Pirates} type, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn. Then, if your opponent has a Character with 5000 or more power, draw 1 card.

name: Come On!! We'll Fight You!!
effect_text: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Red-Haired Pirates} type card other than [Come On!! We'll Fight You!!] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Red Force
effect_text: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Stage: If your Leader has the {Red-Haired Pirates} type, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1000 power during this turn.

name: Lim
effect_text:
Your Character cards are played rested.
[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 3 of your DON!! cards: Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it, and play up to 1 {ODYSSEY} type Character card with a cost of 5 or less from your hand.

name: Adio
effect_text:
[On Play] If your Leader has the {ODYSSEY} type, set up to 3 of your DON!! cards as active.
[On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle.

name: Usopp
effect_text: [On Play] If you have 2 or more rested Characters, draw 2 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand.

name: Crocodile
effect_text: If your Leader has the {ODYSSEY} type, this Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by Leaders.

name: Sakazuki
effect_text: [On Play] If you have 2 or more rested Characters, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

name: Sabo
effect_text: [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] If you have 3 or more rested Characters, draw 1 card.

name: Sanji
effect_text: [On K.O.] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Play up to 1 {ODYSSEY} or {Straw Hat Crew} type Character card with a cost of 4 or less from your trash rested.

name: Tony Tony.Chopper
effect_text: [End of Your Turn] Set up to 1 of your {ODYSSEY} type Characters with a cost of 4 or less as active.

name: Trafalgar Law
effect_text: [On Play] You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand: Play up to 1 {ODYSSEY} type Character card with a cost of 3 or less other than [Trafalgar Law] from your hand.

name: Nico Robin

name: Perona

name: Portgas.D.Ace
effect_text: [On Play] If you have 2 or more rested Characters, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

name: Monkey.D.Luffy

name: Gum-Gum Cuatro Jet Cross Shock Bazooka

effect_text: [Main] If you have 2 or more rested Characters, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.

name: Cabaji
effect_text: If you have a [Buggy] or [Mohji] Character, this Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle.

name: Crocodile
effect_text: [On Play] Play up to 1 {Cross Guild} type Character card or Character card with a type including "Baroque Works" with a cost of 5 or less from your hand.

name: Nami
effect_text: [When Attacking] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 blue Event and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Buggy
effect_text: [On Play] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters at the bottom of the owner's deck. Then, if you do not have 5 Characters with a cost of 5 or more, place this Character at the bottom of the owner's deck.

name: Marco
effect_text: [Opponent's Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: When this Character is K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, play this Character card from your trash rested.

name: Mohji

name: Cross Guild

[DON!! x1] All of your Characters gain +1 cost.

effect_text: [On Play] DON!! −1 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): Set up to 1 of your {Kid Pirates} type Leader as active.

name: Tony Tony.Chopper

effect_text: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} or {Heart Pirates} type card with a cost of 2 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

effect_text: [On Play] You may return 1 or more DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck: Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.

This Character cannot be K.O.'d by your opponent's effects.

name: My Era...Begins!!

name: Kuzan

name: Professor Clover
